title: Acyntha conspicua
taxonomy: Acyntha conspicua is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids. Acyntha conspicua is native to Australia and belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. The classification of this orchid is further detailed in its taxonomy, which includes its family and genus designations. Further research may be necessary to determine its exact classification within the Orchidaceae family.
uses: Acyntha conspicua, also known as the Conspicuous Acacia, is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties.
